title: Adobe CJM ExperienceEvent - Integration Context
description: Per-event integration identity for outbound integration (Data Integration) executions. Present alongside `customExecutionMetrics` when `customExecutionMetrics.executionType` is `integration`. Integrations are a flat (single-layer) entity, in contrast to the three-layer custom-channel model: a single `integrationID` + `integrationName` pair fully identifies the integration definition that this execution invoked. Other execution types (such as `channel`) populate their own context field group (`customChannelContext`) and leave this absent.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Integration ID
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Identifier — the unique ID of the customer-configured integration that this execution invoked. Used as the primary identifier for filtering integration monitoring. Stable for the lifetime of the integration definition.

https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.title: Integration Name
https://ns.adobe.com/experience/customer.description: Display name of the integration definition (for example, `My CRM Sync` or `Salesforce Lead Push`), chosen when the integration was created. Used as the row label in integration monitoring.
